form.label: Llama Wrangler Operations
form.description: Metadata-only consensus, queue, streaming, benchmark, routing, and model lifecycle operations.

search.query: `llama_wrangler_consensus` | stats sum(failed_count) as failed_participants | fillnull value=0 failed_participants
`llama_wrangler_queue` | stats max(queue_depth) as peak_queue_depth | fillnull value=0 peak_queue_depth

`llama_wrangler_consensus` | timechart span=5m sum('failure_reason_counts.missing_proxy_url') as missing_proxy_url sum('failure_reason_counts.connection_error') as connection_error sum('failure_reason_counts.upstream_4xx') as upstream_4xx sum('failure_reason_counts.upstream_5xx') as upstream_5xx sum('failure_reason_counts.body_read_failure') as body_read_failure sum('failure_reason_counts.response_size_limit') as response_size_limit sum('failure_reason_counts.timeout') as timeout sum('failure_reason_counts.cancellation') as cancellation

`llama_wrangler_consensus` | table _time request_id execution_mode participant_count required_participants successful_count failed_count consensus_reached timed_out client_cancelled agreement_score comparison_strategy winner_node | sort - _time
`llama_wrangler_queue` | timechart span=1m max(queue_depth) as queue_depth by priority
`llama_wrangler_queue` | stats count as events max(queue_depth) as peak_queue_depth latest(queue_capacity) as queue_capacity by scheduling_policy priority status | sort - events

panel.title: Streaming Retry, Partial, and Cancellation Events

search.query: `llama_wrangler_streaming_outcomes` | table _time request_id event_type selected_node reason retry_phase retry_allowed partial_output bytes_written stream | sort - _time

`llama_wrangler_benchmark_scheduler` | table _time event_type node_id benchmark_id status scheduler scheduler_state attempt max_attempts lease_timeout_seconds retry_delay_seconds background_enabled tick_interval_seconds changed timed_out retried exhausted reason error_code | sort - _time

`llama_wrangler_benchmark_runner` | table _time status mode enabled result_body_policy benchmark_id suite_id task_count claimed completed failed no_job error_code poll_interval_seconds max_jobs_per_tick | sort - _time

`llama_wrangler_routing` | spath path=excluded_nodes{} output=excluded_node | mvexpand excluded_node | spath input=excluded_node path=control_level output=control_level | spath input=excluded_node path=trust_level output=trust_level | spath input=excluded_node path=capability_source output=capability_source | spath input=excluded_node path=reasons{} output=reason_code | mvexpand reason_code | stats count as exclusions by reason_code control_level trust_level capability_source | sort - exclusions
`llama_wrangler_routing` | table _time request_id model_alias execution_mode selected_node routing_strategy routing_reasons consensus_required consensus_limit | sort - _time

`llama_wrangler_model_lifecycle_actions` | table _time event_type node_id control_level trust_level approval_state action_id action_type model desired_keep_warm status error_code reason_codes | sort - _time
